sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find red cross positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'r':
        boundary = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
        cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
        center_row = sum(rows) // len(rows)
        center_col = sum(cols) // len(cols)
        print(f"Red object: px={n['pixels']} center=({center_row}, {center_col})")

# Try clicking on the top-right red cross
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 10, 'col': 52}])
print(f"\nboard_changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed', False)}")
print(f"level_completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"game_over: {last_action_result.get('game_over', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
